name: Bombardier Beetle
description: A Tier 2 enemy with extremely valuable parts, but also one of the most punishing creatures in its range if you let it box you into acid. Every fight against it is really about refusing to stand where it wants you to fight.
behavior: It patrols specific areas and in combat rotates through bites, close spray, ranged acid shots, and high volleys to cover different angles. It does not beat you with raw speed so much as by gradually turning the floor into bad decisions.
interactionWithPlayer: It turns hostile on sight and forces movement through almost the entire fight. Even on death it leaves a final blast and a short sizzle hazard, so rushing in to loot is yet another way to get punished.
interactionWithCreatures: It is neutral to many creatures, but some slower or heavier prey still trigger its aggression. When it collides with snails or cockroaches, the area quickly becomes a small disaster of acid and oversized bodies.
strategy: You need steady damage and, above all, disciplined positioning. The direct attacks are readable, but the real punishment starts the moment you agree to fight on top of the acid pools. Watch the floor as much as the beetle itself.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 30. Close-Range Spray: 20. Ranged Shot: 35. 3 Upwards Shot: 35.

inflicts: Its bite deals stabbing damage. All acid attacks deal burning damage and leave temporary sizzle hazards.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A basic blockable bite at close range.

abilities.name: Close-Range Spray
abilities.description: It sprays acid in front of itself and creates a frontal sizzle zone. A shield blocks it reliably.

abilities.name: Ranged Shot
abilities.description: It raises its abdomen and lobs an acid glob at the player's location.

abilities.name: 3 Upwards Shot
abilities.description: It fires three globs upward to coat the surrounding area with acid.

abilities.name: Blocking Stance
abilities.description: It tucks its head and advances slowly, ignoring frontal light attacks until hit by a charged strike.
